reasoning: `map_finite` is `external_body` with `unimplemented!()` — finiteness preservation of `Set::map` is a provable property (by induction on set cardinality) but is instead trusted as an axiom, creating an unnecessary soundness dependency.
Mapping an empty set produces an empty set by the definition of `Set::map` — no element exists to satisfy the existential in the mapped set's membership predicate. Standard mathematical property.

The auto lemma correctly propagates finiteness through chained maps: `s.finite()` implies `s.map(f).finite()`, which in turn implies `s.map(f).map(g).finite()` by the same universal quantifier. This is the intended behavior of the broadcast lemma.
